series_metadata.series_description: These include the payroll disbursement journal which is a computer print-out submitted each pay period to the Auditor of State authorizing payment to all personnel currently on the payroll upon certification by Personnel Dept. and the Director of Finance. These records also include sick leave forms and voluntary deduction forms submitted by employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Current year and past retained in department. Four years past and older sent retention 4 years
